goal: Install and validate a real local Marker document conversion runtime.
reason: Marker is the final required parser backend without dependency remediation and real smoke evidence.

license_risk.model_weights: Separate commercial-use conditions documented by the upstream project
license_risk.decision: Allowed for local development smoke; EXE bundling remains blocked pending explicit license compatibility review.

rollback_plan: Remove only Marker model files created under the project-local .heitang_cache/marker path.
Revert only the Marker adapter and Marker-specific tests added by this action if runtime integration is abandoned.
Re-run check-marker-backend and smoke-marker-backend to confirm the rollback state.
validation_plan: Record the installed marker-pdf version and console entry points.
Update the adapter to require and invoke the real CLI with CPU and project-local cache settings.
Run smoke-marker-backend against a valid one-page PDF.
Require runtime_invoked=true and non-empty normalized text before passing.
next_resume_step: Create a project-local virtual environment and install parser-marker.
